title: Cobblemon town
description: Create and build your own cobblemon town with friends!
body:
_This modpack contains QOL mods and optimized mods to make your cobblemon experience better_ 

_We recommend putting more than 4gb of ram for the modpack_


**COBBLEMON TOWNS 🏘️** 

We are a community dedicated server offering up to date cobblemon features as well as monthly updates 

**FEATURES**

Towns - Build your own town with your friends!

Expeditions - Start your own expedition defeat pokemon and raids

Cash Prize Tournaments - Win real cash by winning our tournaments!

Ranked System - Test your skills against other players

Economy - Advanced economy features
